name: GCash Philippines E-Wallet API
what_it_does: GCash Philippines digital wallet REST API for merchants to accept mobile wallet payments, QR codes, and online checkout from the Philippines' dominant e-wallet with 60+ million users backed by Ant International and Globe Telecom for e-commerce, in-app, and merchant payment integration across the Philippines. Enables AI agents to manage GCash payment request creation for Philippines wallet checkout automation, handle QR code generation for Philippines in-store merchant payment automation, access GCash online payment link for Philippines e-commerce automation, retrieve payment status confirmation for Philippines transaction automation, manage refund processing for Philippines order management automation, handle webhook notification for Philippines payment event automation, access transaction reporting for Philippines payment analytics automation, retrieve merchant settlement for Philippines reconciliation automation, manage GCash recurring payment for Philippines subscription automation, and integrate GCash with Philippine e-commerce, food delivery, and ride-sharing platforms for end-to-end Philippines payment automation.
use_cases: Accepting GCash wallet payments from Philippines e-commerce checkout agents
Generating QR codes for Philippines in-store merchants from POS automation agents
Processing GCash online checkout from Philippines mobile app payment agents
Confirming GCash payment status from Philippines order fulfillment agents
not_for: International card acceptance (use PayMongo or Xendit for Philippines card processing)
Indonesia payments (GCash and DANA/GoPay are separate; use DOKU for Indonesia)
best_when: A Philippine merchant or app developer wanting AI agents to automate GCash wallet payment acceptance, QR code generation, and payment confirmation for the Philippines' most popular digital wallet.
avoid_when: GCash MERCHANT API REQUIRES PARTNER APPROVAL: GCash merchant API requires Globe Telecom/Mynt merchant partnership; automated self-service API access without partnership creates unauthorized access; automated integration requires GCash business development engagement. REDIRECT-BASED CHECKOUT FOR ONLINE: GCash online payment redirects consumer to GCash app for wallet authentication; automated checkout must redirect consumer; automated server-side payment without consumer redirect creates no payment interface. BSP REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: GCash is BSP (Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas) regulated; automated merchant integration must comply with BSP merchant onboarding requirements; automated integration without BSP-compliant merchant registration creates regulatory non-compliance. HMAC SIGNATURE REQUIRED FOR REQUESTS: GCash API requests require HMAC signature for authenticity; automated requests must compute valid HMAC signature; automated unsigned requests create authentication failure.

auth.notes: GCash uses API key + Secret Key with HMAC-SHA256 signing for merchant API. REST API with JSON. Taguig, Philippines HQ. Mynt (Globe + Ant International JV). 60M+ users. Products: E-wallet, QR code, online checkout, GCredit, GInvest. BSP-licensed (EMI). PCI DSS. Philippines' dominant e-wallet. Competes with Maya for Philippines digital wallet.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox free; production requires merchant partnership
pricing.paid_tiers: Transaction fee 1.5-2.5% per transaction by merchant category; volume discounts
pricing.notes: Taguig PH. Globe/Ant International JV. Per-transaction fees in PHP. BSP regulated. Partnership required.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; payment and query APIs throttled; webhooks for payment events

known_agent_gotchas: CONSUMER REDIRECT TO GCash APP REQUIRED: GCash online payment redirects consumer to GCash mobile app; automated checkout must generate redirect URL and present to consumer; automated server-side-only GCash payment creates no consumer payment interface

PAYMENT STATUS POLLING AFTER REDIRECT: GCash payment status requires explicit query after consumer returns; automated fulfillment must check payment status on return URL; automated immediate fulfillment on return without status check creates premature order completion

REFERENCE ID MUST BE UNIQUE PER TRANSACTION: GCash merchant reference ID must be unique per payment request; automated retry must generate new reference ID; automated reference reuse creates duplicate transaction rejected

WEBHOOK SIGNATURE VERIFICATION MANDATORY: GCash webhooks include HMAC signature; automated webhook must verify signature before processing; automated unverified webhook creates spoofed payment acceptance vulnerability

PESO AMOUNT WITHOUT CENTAVO FOR STANDARD TRANSACTIONS: GCash standard transaction amounts are in PHP; automated amount calculation should verify denomination requirement; automated incorrect denomination creates payment amount discrepancy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Philippines e-wallet. BSP-licensed, PCI-DSS. HMAC signing. PH. Mobile payment data. Ant International JV.

security_score_components.security_notes: Philippines e-wallet. BSP-licensed. HMAC signing. PH. Mobile payment data.
